steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The requested input is $-4$, so replace $x$ with $-4$ in the rule for $h$. This gives an expression for the output value.
$$h(-4)=5(-4)-9$$

steps.title: Compute the output
steps.content:
Evaluate the multiplication first, then subtract $9$.
$$h(-4)=-20-9$$
$$h(-4)=-29$$
The output is the value of the function at $x=-4$. The answer is D.
